criteria_results.criterion: gemini CLI is detected and version is recorded.
criteria_results.detail: validation-evidence.json records Gemini CLI version 0.40.0 and gemini/gemini.cmd paths; ledger TASK_CREATED details also record version 0.40.0.

criteria_results.criterion: run-validator-b live execution is attempted with a fresh Validator-B handoff.
criteria_results.detail: validator-b-input.json is a Validator-B/Gemini CLI fresh-session handoff, and validator-b-run-5.json records a live gemini.cmd attempt with exit_status 0.

criteria_results.criterion: Validator-B result artifact is produced and parses as Validator-B / Gemini CLI result, or a Resource Failure is recorded with clear cause.
criteria_results.detail: validator-b-result-1.json is a valid Validator-B / Gemini CLI validator result with verdict PASS; validator-b-stdout-5.json shows the Gemini stdout envelope response containing that result.

criteria_results.criterion: If parser changes are required, node --check and audit:harness pass.
criteria_results.detail: Parser/wrapper changes were made. validation-evidence.json and ledger LOCAL_VALIDATION record node --check scripts/run-validator-b.mjs PASS, npm run audit:harness PASS, and git diff --check PASS. Validator-A sandbox policy blocked re-executing node/npm locally.

criteria_results.criterion: Validator-A validation passes before main merge.
criteria_results.detail: This Validator-A review found the referenced Generator result satisfies the Task Spec success criteria. No merge was performed.

log.result: Read AGENTS, architecture, security, validator role, Task Spec, Generator result, schema, changed files, validation evidence, ledger, and Validator-B artifacts.
Confirmed Gemini run metadata for attempt 5 exit_status 0 and stdout envelope {session_id,response,stats} containing a Validator-B/Gemini CLI PASS result.
Reviewed run-validator-b.mjs and audit-harness.mjs changes for the prompt-file transport, Windows .cmd PowerShell invocation, read-only approval-mode plan path, and result parsing.

git diff --check passed with CRLF warnings only; node --check and npm run audit:harness were blocked by current Validator-A execution policy, so recorded validation-evidence.json was used for those command results.
All success criteria passed; no errors found.
